original_statement: who did the chicago bears draft in 2000 that attended the same college as fellow draftee dustin lyman?
mutated_statement: who did the team do something in 2000 that attended the same college as a fellow draftee?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Action vagueness] + [Named-entity anonymization]: "the chicago bears" → "the team" | "draft" → "do something" (specific verb replaced by vague placeholder) | "fellow draftee dustin lyman" → "a fellow draftee" (proper name removed)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的 judge_thought 与 chain 中可以看到关键语句："The only college that appears more than once is Wake Forest... Therefore, they are the draftees..." 与评判结论直接给出 "dustin lyman|reggie austin"。整个日志中没有出现任何表示不确定、模糊、需要澄清或请求更多信息的表述。Agent 直接按照自己的理解（查找重复学院并返回具体人名）完成任务，既没有指出原问题被泛化与匿名化导致的信息缺失，也没有向用户反问或声明无法确定，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
